meta.title: Milwaukee Comprehensive Event Calendar Data Sources
meta.description: A structured reference of all Milwaukee event listing websites, venues, APIs, RSS feeds, and iCal endpoints for building a comprehensive Milwaukee event calendar.

sources.name: Visit Milwaukee
sources.notes: Official Milwaukee tourism authority. No public RSS. Accepts event submissions. Widest coverage of all event types.

sources.name: Urban Milwaukee
sources.notes: Confirmed working iCal and RSS feeds. Broad coverage of Milwaukee arts, music, food, and community events. Free event submissions accepted.

sources.name: Shepherd Express
sources.notes: Alternative news weekly. Events platform powered by City Spark. RSS feed confirmed. Strong arts, music, and nightlife coverage.

sources.name: Milwaukee Record
sources.notes: Local music and culture. Weekly curated event picks. Strong local music coverage. WordPress RSS confirmed.

sources.name: OnMilwaukee
sources.notes: Milwaukee's daily lifestyle magazine. Covers festivals, dining, sports, music. RSS confirmed.

sources.name: Milwaukee Magazine
sources.notes: City magazine with curated events calendar. RSS confirmed.

sources.name: Milwaukee Journal Sentinel / jsonline.com
sources.notes: Major daily newspaper. Interactive events calendar. 'Things to do' weekly guides.

sources.name: Radio Milwaukee (88Nine)
sources.notes: Community radio. Free event submissions. Covers sports, arts, festivals, food. Strong local music focus.

sources.name: WMSE 91.7FM
sources.notes: Confirmed working RSS with full event descriptions. Covers Chill on the Hill, Washington Park Wednesdays, Lake Park Musical Mondays, Jazz at the Vine, and more.

sources.name: MKE Shows
sources.notes: Milwaukee's centralized music calendar. Community-submitted. Filter exports by tags and venue. Open data philosophy. Best source for local/indie music.

sources.name: Milwaukee Independent
sources.notes: Award-winning daily news magazine. Covers community events and arts.

sources.name: Milwaukee Neighborhood News Service
sources.notes: Covers neighborhood events and community activities across Milwaukee.

sources.name: Resident Advisor Milwaukee
sources.notes: Electronic and dance music focus. Good for underground/club events. No official public API.

sources.name: Discover the North Shore
sources.notes: Covers Shorewood, Whitefish Bay, Fox Point, Bayside, River Hills, Glendale. Includes Shorewood Farmers Market.

sources.name: City of Milwaukee Events Calendar
sources.notes: Official city government events, public meetings, and community programs.

sources.name: Milwaukee County Parks Events Calendar
sources.notes: 200+ live music events per summer. Chill on the Hill, Jazz in the Park, River Rhythms, Washington Park Wednesdays, Concerts in the Parks.

sources.name: Milwaukee County Events Calendar
sources.notes: Consolidated county calendar including Parks, DHHS, Child Support Services, and Board Meetings. Includes Chill on the Hill, Washington Park Wednesdays, Domes events.

sources.name: Ticketmaster Discovery API
sources.notes: Largest ticketing platform. Covers Fiserv Forum, Marcus Performing Arts Center, American Family Field, and more.

sources.name: SeatGeek API
sources.notes: Clean REST API. Covers concerts, sports, theater, comedy. Partner program available.

sources.name: AXS
sources.notes: Ticketing partner for Pabst Theater Group (Pabst Theater, Riverside Theater, Turner Hall, Miller High Life Theatre, Vivarium). No public API.

sources.name: Eventbrite
sources.notes: Best source for community, independent, networking, and local events not on Ticketmaster.

sources.name: Bandsintown

api_details.note: Artist-centric — query by artist name, not city. Best for tracking specific bands playing Milwaukee.

sources.notes: Free app_id available. Returns event date, venue, location, ticket links, and lineup.

sources.name: Songkick

api_details.auth: API Key (requires partnership agreement + license fee)

sources.notes: Large concert database. API requires paid license. Good for concert history and gigography.

sources.name: Live Nation
sources.notes: No public API. Venue-specific pages available. Ticketmaster API covers Live Nation events.

sources.name: Fiserv Forum
sources.notes: Home of Milwaukee Bucks (NBA). Major national concerts and events.

sources.name: Pabst Theater Group
sources.notes: Manages 6 iconic Milwaukee venues. Consolidated calendar on main events page.

sources.name: Landmark Credit Union Live
sources.notes: New outdoor amphitheater (opened 2026) in Deer District. Major summer concerts.

sources.name: Marcus Performing Arts Center
sources.notes: Home of Broadway touring shows. Uihlein Hall. Multiple performance spaces.

sources.name: American Family Field (Milwaukee Brewers)
sources.notes: MLB home games + special ballpark events. MLB provides iCal schedule feed.

sources.name: Milwaukee World Festival Grounds / Henry Maier Festival Park
sources.notes: Manages Henry Maier Festival Park. Hosts Summerfest + all ethnic/cultural festivals.

sources.name: Summerfest
sources.notes: World's largest music festival. No public feed. Lineup page is HTML-scrapeable.

sources.name: South Milwaukee Performing Arts Center
sources.notes: Suburban performing arts center with seasonal calendar.

sources.name: Cactus Club
sources.notes: 25+ year artist-run venue. All-ages and 18+ shows. HTML event list on homepage. Also listed on MKE Shows.

sources.name: Linneman's Riverwest Inn
sources.notes: 33+ year neighborhood venue. Confirmed working RSS feed. Primarily local and regional acts.

sources.name: Shank Hall
sources.notes: Since 1989. Intimate showcase venue. National and regional touring acts.

sources.name: The Rave / Eagles Club
sources.notes: Multiple rooms: Eagles Ballroom (cap. 4,500), The Rave, The Eagles Club. HTML calendar page is scrapeable.

sources.name: The Cooperage
sources.notes: Waterfront venue. Concerts, dance parties, festivals. Uses Eventbrite for ticketing.

sources.name: X-Ray Arcade
sources.notes: Artist-owned. All-ages focus. Also listed on MKE Shows.

sources.name: Sugar Maple
sources.notes: Bay View bar with regular live music events. Events tracked on MKE Shows.

sources.name: High Dive
sources.notes: Riverwest dive bar with live music. No dedicated website. Events tracked on MKE Shows and RA.

sources.name: Mad Planet
sources.notes: Electronic, dance, goth. Open Fri & Sat. HTML events page. Listed on Resident Advisor.

sources.name: Station 1846
sources.notes: Bar and event space in converted mechanic shop. Live music.

sources.name: MKE Ultra
sources.notes: Mitchell Street venue. Events tracked on MKE Shows.

sources.name: Deer District / The Deer Garden
sources.address: 1134 N Vel R Phillips Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53203
sources.notes: Free Friday summer concerts (4-7pm), fitness events, markets, Bucks watch parties.

sources.name: The Laughing Tap
sources.notes: Milwaukee's dedicated stand-up comedy club. Weekly shows + special events. National headliners.

sources.name: Milwaukee Improv
sources.notes: Major national touring comedians. Located in Brookfield.

sources.name: ComedySportz Milwaukee
sources.notes: Family-friendly competitive improv. Regular shows + workshops + private events.

sources.name: Milwaukee Public Market
sources.notes: Year-round indoor market. Hosts Milwaukee Mornings concerts, Gallery Night pop-ups, cooking classes, and seasonal events.

sources.name: Fondy Farmers Market
sources.address: 2200 W Fond du Lac Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53206
sources.notes: One of Milwaukee's oldest and largest markets. 150+ varieties of produce. Events page on website.

sources.name: South Shore Farmers Market
sources.notes: Community market in South Shore Park. Nonprofit organizations participate.

sources.name: Cathedral Square Market
sources.address: Cathedral Square Park, 520 E Wells St, Milwaukee, WI 53202
sources.notes: Fresh produce, crafts, live entertainment. Managed by East Town Association.

sources.name: Milwaukee Night Market
sources.address: W Wisconsin Ave between 2nd St & Vel R Phillips Ave, Milwaukee, WI
sources.notes: Evening outdoor market with vendors, food, and entertainment.

sources.name: West Allis Farmers Market
sources.notes: One of the largest farmers markets in SE Wisconsin.

sources.name: Milwaukee Farmers Market Coalition
sources.notes: UW-Extension resource listing all Milwaukee-area farmers markets. Good master reference.

sources.name: Milwaukee Downtown (BID #21)
sources.notes: Premier downtown BID. Annual signature events plus ongoing programming.

sources.name: Historic Third Ward (BID #2)
signature_events_list: Third Ward Art Festival (Labor Day weekend)
sources.notes: Arts, dining, shopping district. Gallery Night MKE: https://gallerynightmke.com/ (July 17-18, Oct 16-17, 2026).

sources.name: Brady Street (BID #11)
sources.notes: Lower East Side neighborhood. Annual festival draws large crowds.

sources.name: Historic King Drive (BID #8)
sources.notes: African-American cultural corridor. Community calendar on website.

sources.name: East Side (BID #20)
sources.notes: East North Avenue neighborhood. Events and happenings page on website.

sources.name: Westown Association (BID #5)
sources.notes: West of the Milwaukee River. Home to major venues, hotels, and Old World Third Street.

sources.name: Menomonee River Valley (BID #26)

feeds.ical: https://www.thevalleymke.org/events (Google Calendar ICS links on individual events)

sources.notes: Events page includes Google Calendar ICS links on individual events.

sources.name: Harbor District (BID #51)
sources.notes: Port of Milwaukee area revitalization. Annual Harbor Fest.

sources.name: Near West Side Partners (BID #10)
sources.notes: Active community calendar with free neighborhood events, fitness classes, and block parties.

sources.name: Historic Downer Avenue (BID #41)
sources.notes: East Side neighborhood near UWM. Annual bike race and Halloween event.

sources.name: Historic Mitchell Street (BID #4)
sources.notes: South Side Latino cultural corridor. Street festivals and community events.

sources.name: Granville (BID #48)
sources.notes: North side neighborhood. Festivals and community-led events.

sources.name: Villard Avenue (BID #19)
signature_events_list: Vibes on Villard Concert Series (Wednesdays, summer)
sources.notes: North Side. Free summer concert series. Primarily social media presence.

sources.name: South 27th Street / Historic Highway 41 (BID #43)
sources.notes: South Side corridor. Easter Brunch & Egg Hunt and other seasonal events.

sources.name: Bay View Neighborhood Association
signature_events_list: Bay View Bash (3rd Saturday in September)
sources.notes: Organizer of Chill on the Hill free concert series. Bay View Bash: http://www.bayviewbash.org/

sources.name: Walker's Point Association
sources.notes: Community organization for Walker's Point neighborhood. Upcoming events listed on website.

sources.name: Discover the North Shore
sources.notes: Covers Shorewood, Whitefish Bay, Fox Point, Bayside, River Hills, Glendale.

sources.name: Milwaukee Art Museum (MAM)
sources.notes: Iconic Calatrava-designed museum. Thursday Nights at MAM, Lakefront Festival of Art (June).

sources.name: Milwaukee Public Museum
sources.notes: Natural history museum. Filter calendar by event category.

sources.name: Discovery World
sources.notes: Science museum & aquarium. Live @ the Lakefront concert series. Milwaukee Makers Market.

sources.name: Milwaukee Repertory Theater
sources.notes: 13-production season. Three performance spaces (Quadracci Powerhouse, Stackner Cabaret, Stiemke Studio).

sources.name: Milwaukee Ballet
sources.notes: Professional ballet company. Performs at Marcus Performing Arts Center.

sources.name: Milwaukee Symphony Orchestra
sources.notes: Bradley Symphony Center. Official ticket seller. 2026/27 season announced.

sources.name: Pabst Mansion
sources.notes: Historic mansion at 2000 W Wisconsin Ave. Tours and special events.

sources.name: Doors Open Milwaukee
sources.notes: Annual citywide celebration of Milwaukee architecture and history. Free event.

sources.name: Gallery Night MKE
sources.notes: Milwaukee's original quarterly gallery hop. Free. Historic Third Ward focus.

sources.name: Milwaukee Institute of Art and Design (MIAD)
sources.notes: Art school with public exhibitions and events.

sources.name: Milwaukee Public Library (MPL)

feeds.api: Communico platform — no public RSS confirmed. Filter by age group, location, event type via URL params.

sources.notes: Free events for all ages across 13+ branches. Programs include story times, tech classes, author talks, Library Loud Days, and community events.

sources.name: Summerfest
sources.notes: World's largest music festival. 11 stages.

sources.name: Festa Italiana
sources.notes: Hosted by Italian Community Center.

sources.name: Polish Fest
sources.notes: One of the largest Polish festivals in the US.

sources.name: German Fest Milwaukee
sources.notes: Authentic German food, music, and entertainment.

sources.name: Milwaukee Irish Fest
sources.notes: World's largest Irish music festival. 17+ stages.

sources.name: African World Festival
sources.notes: Celebrates African and African-American heritage.

sources.name: PrideFest Milwaukee
sources.notes: LGBTQ+ pride festival. Annual summer event.

sources.name: Bastille Days
sources.notes: Free 4-day French festival. 250,000+ attendees annually. Live music, international marketplace.

sources.name: Bronzeville Week
sources.notes: 15th annual. Arts, music, food, and community programming.

sources.name: Lakefront Brewery
sources.notes: Drag Queen Bingo, Trivia, Keg Stand Up. Highly active events calendar.

sources.name: Milwaukee Brewing Co
sources.notes: Bay View taproom. Hosts beer releases, live music, and private events.

sources.name: Third Space Brewing
sources.notes: Quizmaster Trivia, live music, Central Time Thursdays.

sources.name: Indeed Brewing Company
sources.notes: Trivia Thursdays, Vinyl Vibes, Cribbage Night, Magic: The Gathering Commander Night.

sources.name: The Explorium Brewpub
sources.notes: Live music, trivia, and house events across multiple locations.

sources.name: Saint Kate - The Arts Hotel
sources.notes: Nightly live music, art tours, exhibitions, specialty dinners (The Dark Room).

sources.name: Transfer Pizzeria Café
sources.notes: Latin Sessions, Martini Jazz Lounge, regular live music.

sources.name: On Tap Bar & Restaurant
sources.notes: Beer Garden Jams (live music Fridays), TuneMaster Music Bingo, Sunday Brunch & Beats.

sources.name: Boone & Crockett
sources.notes: Flannel Fest, holiday pop-ups, vintage candle classes, themed parties.

sources.name: Zócalo Food Park
sources.notes: Food truck park. Live music, comedy, poetry, Michelada Fest, Cinco de Mayo.

sources.name: Red Rock Saloon
sources.notes: Live country music Fridays/Saturdays, student nights, ticket giveaways.

sources.name: Swingin' Door Exchange
sources.notes: Historic saloon. Highly rated for dining; occasional special events.

sources.name: Café Benelux
sources.notes: Rooftop dining events, holiday brunches, watch parties.

sources.name: Best Place at the Historic Pabst Brewery
sources.notes: Beer history tours, public events, live music in historic setting.

sources.name: Art*Bar
sources.notes: Riverwest Rummage Sale hub, Mini Art Show, rotating gallery exhibits.

sources.name: Milwaukee Brewers (MLB)
sources.notes: Full season schedule via MLB Stats API (free, no auth). iCal sync via mlb.ecal.com/mil. CSV download available. teamId=158 for Brewers.

sources.name: Milwaukee Bucks (NBA)
sources.notes: iCal sync via nba.ecal.com. NBA Stats API is free and public. Filter by teamId=1610612749 (Bucks) in schedule endpoint.

sources.name: Milwaukee Admirals (AHL Hockey)
sources.notes: AHL affiliate of Nashville Predators. Schedule on site; no public iCal or RSS. Also listed on theahl.com. Printable PDF schedule available.

sources.name: Milwaukee Wave (Indoor Soccer)
sources.notes: Longest-running professional indoor soccer franchise in the US. Schedule on site; no public feed confirmed.

sources.name: Milwaukee Milkmen (Baseball, ALPB)
sources.notes: Atlantic League of Professional Baseball. Downloadable schedule PDF on site. Theme nights and promotions listed.

sources.name: FC Milwaukee Torrent (Soccer, WPSL/NPSL)
sources.notes: Men's and Women's soccer. WPSL and NPSL leagues. Schedule on site.

sources.name: UWM Panthers (NCAA D1 Athletics)
sources.notes: Composite calendar for all UWM sports. SIDEARM platform supports iCal subscription. Subscribe link available on calendar page.

sources.name: Marquette Golden Eagles (NCAA D1 Athletics)
sources.notes: Composite calendar for all Marquette sports including Big East basketball. SIDEARM platform supports iCal subscription.

sources.name: Fiserv Forum
sources.notes: Home of the Bucks and Marquette basketball. Major concert and event venue. No public feed; scrape events page or use Ticketmaster API with venueId=57843.

sources.name: UWM Panther Arena
sources.notes: Home of Admirals, Wave, and UWM Panthers. Calendar page has Google Calendar, iCalendar, Outlook 365, and Outlook Live export options confirmed.

sources.name: American Family Field
sources.notes: Home of the Brewers. Also hosts concerts and non-baseball events. Use MLB Stats API for game schedule.

sources.name: Brewcity Bruisers (Roller Derby)
sources.notes: Women's flat-track roller derby league. Home games listed on events page. Also on Ticketmaster.

sources.name: Milwaukee Lakefront Marathon
sources.notes: Annual marathon and half marathon along Lake Michigan. October event. Also lists 5K Famous Racing Sausages Run/Walk.

sources.name: RunGuides Milwaukee Race Calendar
sources.notes: Aggregates 5K, 10K, half/full marathons, ultras, road and trail races in the Milwaukee area.

sources.name: Milwaukee Recreation (City Sports Leagues)
sources.notes: City-run sports leagues: basketball, golf, flag football, kickball, soccer, softball, tennis, volleyball. Also youth sports events.

sources.name: Visit Milwaukee Sports Events Calendar
sources.notes: Dedicated sports events sub-calendar from Visit Milwaukee. Covers tournaments, major sporting events, and spectator sports.

categories.name: Confirmed Automated Endpoints Summary
categories.description: These are the confirmed working RSS, iCal, and API endpoints suitable for automated event ingestion into a Milwaukee event calendar.

endpoints.coverage: Broad Milwaukee events — arts, music, food, community
Free outdoor concert series, local music events
